description: Directory API returns a 504 timeout. Agent must halt, surface the exact error, and offer an escalation path.

directory_api.error_message: Gateway Timeout: Directory API did not respond within the SLA window.

expected_outcome: Agent halts sequence, surfaces the 504 error verbatim, and offers to open an IT support ticket.
failure_modes_to_catch: Agent catches the exception silently and proceeds with a hallucinated balance.
Agent assumes a default safe state (e.g., balance_sufficient=true) after the timeout.
Agent enters a silent retry loop without surfacing the failure to the user.
